entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International center for research in the semi-arid tropics and its partners

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: Research aimed at advancing agriculture in resource-poor environments

entities.name: LOW HOUSEHOLD AND NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Environments characterized by limited household and natural resources

entities.name: HIGH CLIMATIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: Environments characterized by significant fluctuations in climate

entities.name: LIMITED INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: Environments with poor physical and organizational structures

entities.name: SIMULATION MODELING
entities.description: Application of simulation models to agricultural research

entities.name: CLIMATE FORECASTING
entities.description: Methods used to predict future climate conditions

entities.name: CLIMATE-CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns

entities.name: ADAPTATION STRATEGIES
entities.description: Strategies developed to adjust to climate change

entities.name: ECONOMIC APPROACHES TO FOOD SECURITY ANALYSES
entities.description: Economic methods used to analyze food security

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: MARKET STUDIES
entities.description: Research into market dynamics and trends

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis of the relationship between economic, cultural, and social factors

entities.name: INVESTMENT DECISIONS
entities.description: Decisions made by farmers regarding investments in their farms

entities.name: RISK-RETURN TRADE-OFFS
entities.description: The balance between the potential return on an investment and the risk associated with it

entities.name: GENDER-RELATED FACTORS
entities.description: Factors related to gender that influence agricultural choices

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY CHOICE
entities.description: The process of selecting specific technologies for agricultural use

entities.name: EXTENSION METHODS
entities.description: Methods used to promote the adoption of new technologies

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY ADOPTION
entities.description: The acceptance and use of new agricultural technologies

entities.name: GIS-BASED MAPPING AND CHARACTERIZATION METHODS
entities.description: Methods using Geographic Information Systems for mapping and characterization

entities.name: MODELING OF SOIL LOSS AND SURFACE WATER RUNOFF
entities.description: Methods to model the loss of soil and the runoff of surface water

entities.name: SOIL LOSS
entities.description: The removal of the topsoil layer from the land

entities.name: SURFACE WATER RUNOFF
entities.description: Water from rain or snowmelt that flows over the land surface

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL NICHES
entities.description: Specific environmental or economic opportunities for agriculture

entities.name: FALLOWS
entities.description: Land that is plowed and left unseeded for a period

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: The state of being extremely poor

entities.name: FOOD INSECURITY
entities.description: The state of being without reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARM COMMUNITIES
entities.description: Communities consisting of small-scale farmers

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low and irregular rainfall in tropical zones
